title: senecio rhombifolius
intro: Senecio rhombifolius, also known as the rounded leafed ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Senecio rhombifolius include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues. Senecio rhombifolius can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
